org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.hardware

Class SRSHub.Config

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.hardware.SRSHub.Config
  • Enclosing class:
    SRSHub

    public static class SRSHub.Config
extends java.lang.Object

      protected SRSHub.Encoder[] encoders

    • Field Detail

      • locked

        private boolean locked

      • analogDigitalDevices

        protected final SRSHub.AnalogDigitalDevice[] analogDigitalDevices

      • encoders

        protected final SRSHub.Encoder[] encoders

      • i2cBuses

        protected final java.util.ArrayList<SRSHub.I2CDevice>[] i2cBuses

    • Constructor Detail

      • Config

        public Config()

    • Method Detail

      • setAnalogDigitalDevice

        public void setAnalogDigitalDevice(int pin,
                                   SRSHub.AnalogDigitalDevice device)
        configures an analog-digital pin to be analog, digital, or none
        Parameters:
        pin - the pin being configured, from 1 to 12
        device - the type of device on the pin
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the pin is not between 1 and 12, inclusive
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if init has already been called

      • setEncoder

        public void setEncoder(int port,
                       SRSHub.Encoder device)
        configures an encoder port to be quadrature, pwm, or none
        Parameters:
        port - the port being configured, from 1 to 6
        device - the type of device on the port
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the port is not between 1 and 6, inclusive
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if init has already been called

      • addI2CDevice

        public void addI2CDevice(int bus,
                         SRSHub.I2CDevice device)
        adds a device to an I2C bus
        Parameters:
        bus - the bus to which the device is being added, from 1 to 3
        device - the (unique) type of the device on the bus
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the bus is not between 1 and 3, inclusive
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if init has already been called or if a device of the same I2C address has been configured on the bus

      • lock

        protected void lock()
